p0.summary: Canvas package roles, exports, aliases, in-memory server repository, protocol handlers, and focused contract tests are coherent with the P0 scaffold scope.

p1.summary: Minimal Tauri 2 + React shell, typed app command bridge, explicit canvas command surface, health command, and confined local JSON save/load bridge are implemented.

p2.summary: Create/list/get/add/remove/save/load app command roundtrip, desktop bridge IO routing, confined native persistence, and public error translation are covered by focused app, Rust, and canvas package tests.

prdDeferrals.summary: Deferred PRD capabilities are explicitly tagged for later phases.

phases.name: Boundary-aligned scaffold cleanup
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Packages and exports are coherent with architecture laws and existing files.

phases.name: Tauri shell bootstrap
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: apps/canvas bootstraps and exposes typed scene commands.

phases.name: End-to-end contract proof
phases.exitCriteriaSummary: Roundtrip create/list/get/save/load works through boundary translations.

p0: verify no stale/non-existent canvas exports remain
ensure package aliases include all canvas package roles
p2: p1 command-contract proof via app command bridge and Tauri command surface
boundary translation tests for at least one domain error and one repository error

nextAction: Review P3 scope or select the next PRD slice to promote beyond the bootstrap shell.

completionGate.statement: Not achieved until this goal's work ships as a PR driven to mergeable via /yeet (bun run beep yeet: repair -> verify -> publish --pr -> monitor).
